sections.paragraph: (like יִדְעֹנִי) prop. belonging to a viper’s brood; hence a viper itself, Isa 11:8 59:5 Pro 23:32. Plur. צִפְעֹנִים Jer 8:17. LXX. ( Isa 11:8 14:29 ) ἔκγονα ἀσπίδων. See another etymology under the root צָפַע .-Aqu. βασιλίσκος. Vulg. regulus, whence J. D. Michaëlis understood the horned serpent, or cerastes.
